name: inji-fast-start
description: Inji — a declarative API framework on Express + Zod + TypeORM with OpenAPI auto-generation.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @injitools/contract && npm run build -w @injitools/core && npm run build -w @injitools/db && npm run build -w @injitools/auth && npm run build -w @injitools/cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @injitools/contract && npm run test -w @injitools/core && npm run test -w @injitools/db && npm run test -w @injitools/auth
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @injitools/contract && npm run typecheck -w @injitools/core && npm run typecheck -w @injitools/db && npm run typecheck -w @injitools/auth && npm run typecheck -w @injitools/cli
